name: railly-app
description: Rail Buddy - A self-hosted, real-time UK train companion for commuters

scripts.docker:rebuild: npm run build --workspaces && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:rebuild:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && docker compose build --no-cache api && docker compose up -d api
scripts.docker:rebuild:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && docker compose build --no-cache frontend && docker compose up -d frontend
scripts.docker:rebuild:consumer: npm run build:shared && npm run build:consumer && docker compose build --no-cache consumer && docker compose up -d consumer
